title: Ajazz Control Center — Property Inspector schema
description: Declarative description of the form a plugin's Property Inspector should render. The QML PropertyInspector component reads this schema and produces an inspector pane without any plugin-side code, mirroring the Stream Deck SDK's pattern.

title.description: Pane title shown above the form.

description.description: Optional one-line subtitle rendered under the title.

fields.description: Ordered list of input fields rendered top-to-bottom.

id.description: Stable identifier; used as the key in the resulting settings JSON.

type.description: Field kind. The QML renderer maps each kind to a concrete control.

label.description: Human-readable label shown next to the control.

help.description: Optional inline help text rendered as a muted subtitle.

default.description: Default value. Type must match the chosen `type`.

placeholder.description: Placeholder shown for text/textarea/number fields when empty.

required.description: Whether the field must be filled in before the form is considered valid.

step.description: Step size for numeric fields. Defaults to 1.

value.description: Stored value when this option is chosen.

accept.description: MIME glob restricting which files the file/image picker accepts.
